productName: Northwest Concentrates BUBBLE HASH - Sour Diesel - 1g [ S ]
description: Solventless hybrid bubble hash from Sour D — ice-water washed and sifted through micron mesh bags to collect pristine, trichome-rich resin heads, no chemicals at all. Pure trichome craft, with notes of diesel, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
